<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Read a node cache without activating it.

## Import

```ts
import { nodeSnapshot } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Signature

```ts
function nodeSnapshot(node: Node<T>): T | undefined
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `node` | `Node<T>` | Node to observe, adapt, or connect. |

## Returns

A `T | undefined` value.

## Example

```ts
import { nodeSnapshot } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/store.ts`
